AEMEATH_STARTER_RELIC.title: Everlasting Morningstar
AEMEATH_STARTER_RELIC.flavor: You fly through a silent sea of stars. Stardust breaks apart at your side, and time dies behind you. The long loneliness never vanished; it was stretched, diluted, and reshaped until it became part of your wings. The cosmos tests you with silence, and you answer by continuing forward in radiant light.
AEMEATH_STARTER_RELIC.description: At the start of each combat, gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img][img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img][img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img][img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img][img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. Whenever you play an Attack, gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img].
AEMEATH_FLY_TOWARD_SPRING_RELIC.title: Fly Toward Spring
AEMEATH_FLY_TOWARD_SPRING_RELIC.flavor: It was a dream that first sprouted in childhood, folded into paper wings and lifted by the spring breeze, flying toward the far edge of the starsea. Now, I am finally able to travel at your side.
AEMEATH_FLY_TOWARD_SPRING_RELIC.descript: At the start of combat, gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img]. At the start of each turn, gain 1 [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img]. Whenever you play a card, gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img].
AEMEATH_AMULET_RELIC.title: Amulet
AEMEATH_AMULET_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Buffer.
AEMEATH_PAPER_PLANE_RELIC.title: Paper Plane
AEMEATH_PAPER_PLANE_RELIC.description: The first time you spend Resonance each turn, draw 2 cards.
AEMEATH_GAME_CARTRIDGE_RELIC.title: Game Cartridge
AEMEATH_GAME_CARTRIDGE_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, apply 5 Off Tune to a random enemy.
AEMEATH_CONCERT_POSTER_RELIC.title: Concert Poster
AEMEATH_CONCERT_POSTER_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, gain 3 Gold for each enemy.
AEMEATH_SUPER_LEOPARD_BLIZZARD_RELIC.des: At the start of combat, gain 3 additional Energy. On later turns, your Energy is retained and you lose 1 Energy at the start of turn.
AEMEATH_TUNNELER_FIGURE_RELIC.title: Tunneler Figure
AEMEATH_TUNNELER_FIGURE_RELIC.descriptio: Increase Fusion Burst cap by 5. Whenever Auto-Burst triggers, gain 1 [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img].
AEMEATH_TASK_ANIM_TEST_RELIC.title: Task Animation Tester
AEMEATH_TASK_ANIM_TEST_RELIC.flavor: A relic used to test scrambled mission text decoding.
AEMEATH_TASK_ANIM_TEST_RELIC.description: Inspect this relic to read your current mission.
AEMEATH_TASK_ANIM_TEST_RELIC_TASK.title: Mission
AEMEATH_STARWHEEL_INSIGHT_RELIC.title: Starwheel Insight
AEMEATH_STARWHEEL_INSIGHT_RELIC.descript: At the start of each turn, gain 1 Energy. At the start of combat, draw 2 fewer cards.
AEMEATH_STAR_BLUEPRINT_RELIC.title: Blueprint of Star Imprints
AEMEATH_STAR_BLUEPRINT_RELIC.description: You may ignore paths when choosing the next room, with no limit.
AEMEATH_XIXI_JELLY_RELIC.title: Special Xixi Jelly
AEMEATH_XIXI_JELLY_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, heal 15 HP.
AEMEATH_DESTINED_TIMEPIECE_RELIC.title: Timepiece of the Destined Future
AEMEATH_DESTINED_TIMEPIECE_RELIC.descrip: At the start of turn 3, deal 30 damage to all enemies. At the start of turn 6, deal 60 damage to all enemies.
AEMEATH_FURNACE_CORE_RELIC.title: Furnace Core
AEMEATH_FURNACE_CORE_RELIC.description: At the start of each turn, lose 1 Max HP and draw until your hand is full.
AEMEATH_DETERMINATION_RELIC.title: Determination
AEMEATH_DETERMINATION_RELIC.description: When obtained, add 1 Anonymous Blessing to your deck.
AEMEATH_LOGISTICS_DELIVERY_BOX_RELIC.des: When obtained, gain three Rare card rewards from 3 random characters. Each reward contains 3 cards.
AEMEATH_SNOW_LEOPARD_LEOPARD_RELIC.title: Snow Leopard Leopard
AEMEATH_SNOW_LEOPARD_LEOPARD_RELIC.descr: A Snow Leopard Leopard will accompany you in battle. When obtained, add 1 [gold]Charge! Chaaaaarge![/gold] to your deck.
AEMEATH_CANNED_EFFICIENCY_RELIC.title: Canned Efficiency
AEMEATH_CANNED_EFFICIENCY_RELIC.flavor: A dish Morning completed during a cooking class in her student days. She skipped the decorative fruit on top and added large amounts of Dusk Honey instead, greatly improving single-bite energy replenishment efficiency. According to classmates from that lesson, she also tried to add fish and wet fern clumps for nutritional balance... Very sweet, but efficient.
AEMEATH_CANNED_EFFICIENCY_RELIC.descript: At the start of combat, lose {HpLoss} HP. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards} cards.
AEMEATH_COUNTERFEIT_DWARF_STAR_RELIC.fla: Like a forged collapsed star cupped in your palm, it hangs in stillness, as if ready to drag everything nearby into a distorted night sky.
AEMEATH_COUNTERFEIT_DWARF_STAR_RELIC.des: At the end of each of your turns, all enemies lose 5 Fusion Burst. Your Melt no longer consumes Fusion Burst.
